mnemonics: ETL BOSS - Extraction, Transformation, Loading, Business Intelligence, Operational Data Store, Staging, Storage
keyPoints: ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) tools are the core of data warehousing, used to move and prepare data.
Common tools include Informatica PowerCenter, Microsoft SSIS, Oracle Data Integrator, and Talend.
These tools automate the process of extracting data from source systems, transforming it to fit operational needs, and loading it into the data warehouse.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on the technical ETL process and neglecting data quality and business rules.
Underestimating the complexity and resources required for data cleansing and transformation.
Choosing a tool based on popularity rather than its specific fit for the organization's data sources and needs.
